Minimum Average(s) Required.General degree: A minimum cumulative overall average of 60.0%.
Minimum Average(s) Required.Honours degrees: A minimum cumulative overall average of 65.0%.
Minimum Average(s) Required.note: See major for required major average.

Honours co-op degrees: Students must successfully complete all degree requirements within eight calendar years from the time students first enter their plan.
Students admitted with the equivalent of one year advanced standing must complete the degree requirements in seven calendar years of entry into the plan.
Students admitted with the equivalent of two years of advanced standing must complete the degree requirements in six calendar years of entry into the plan.
Honours regular and general degrees: Students may complete their degree requirements on a part-time basis.
Students admitted with one year or more of advanced standing must complete the degree requirements in 10 years of entry into the degree.

Undergraduate Communication Requirement.description: Students are required to complete one course to meet the Undergraduate Communication Requirement.
Notes: Students enrolled in the Faculty of Health before September 2017 should consult the English Language Proficiency Requirement described in the Calendar of their entry year.
Successful completion of the Undergraduate Communication Requirement will be recorded on a student's transcript.
Students transferring to another faculty may need additional courses to satisfy that faculty's Undergraduate Communication Requirement.
Students transferring into the Faculty of Health who completed the Undergraduate Communication Requirement in another University of Waterloo faculty may have it recognized.
External transfer credits for HEALTH107 are not permitted; the course must be taken at the University of Waterloo.
